opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Every time I stand up my legs turn completely purple and throb with pain, the room spins, and my vision goes black. It's been awful for the last day or two — I can barely stay on my feet long enough to get to the kitchen.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's flared up really badly over the last 24–48 hours — I can't stand for more than about 30 seconds without nearly fainting, and my legs going dark purple has scared me, so someone told me to get it checked to make sure it isn't a clot.

symptom_narrative.onset: I've had this for a while — my heart races and I feel faint when I'm upright — but it has flared up badly over the last day or two
symptom_narrative.duration: much worse for about 48 hours; today I can barely stay upright at all
symptom_narrative.character: when I stand my legs go dark purple/blue and ache and throb, my heart pounds, the room spins, and my vision tunnels and blacks out within about half a minute
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it's ever been — I feel like I'm going to pass out within 30 seconds of standing
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both legs, especially the calves, go purple and throb; the dizziness and blacking out is in my head; my heart pounds in my chest
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it happens every time I stand or let my legs hang down; it eases when I lie down or put my legs up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying down flat or getting my legs up — the colour goes back to normal almost straight away and the dizziness lifts
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing, letting my legs hang down, being upright for more than about half a minute
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: really bad brain fog and exhaustion; I feel pale and shaky when I try to stay upright
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had the racing heart and faintness on standing on and off for a long time, and my specialist has been looking into why my body doesn't control the blood flow to my legs properly — but it's never been this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm basically stuck in bed and have been crawling to the bathroom so I don't faint; there's food in the kitchen I can't stand up long enough to make

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a longstanding problem where my heart races and I go faint and my legs pool with blood when I'm upright — my specialist has been investigating it

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: no regular heart or blood-pressure tablets; I try to keep my salt and fluids up like I was told

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives independently and is managing alone through this flare; high fall risk with no one at home to help with transfers today

objective_data_offered.value: when my legs hang down or I stand, they go dark purple/blue, especially the calves and feet; when I lift them up or lie down the colour goes back to normal within a few seconds
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: colour change visible on video; no measurement of the limb possible remotely

objective_data_offered.value: as soon as I'm upright my heart pounds and races, my vision tunnels and blacks out and I feel like I'll faint; it settles when I lie flat
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-reported sensation — no home blood-pressure cuff or heart-rate/wearable device readings offered

objective_data_offered.value: both calves ache and throb badly when they go purple; it eases when I put my legs up
I keep nearly fainting when I stand, but I haven't actually passed out or fallen — I lie down or crawl before I go down
totally wiped out with terrible brain fog; I can barely think or move
I'm bedbound and crawling to the toilet so I don't black out; I can't stand long enough to make food
I'm sipping salty electrolyte drinks and still passing urine; I'm not vomiting
